name: Moonlight
description:
To my Darling Shimmer My Moonlight - Love Always - Honeybear
In the darkest of times, if you look up, you can find your way by the
shimmering light of the moon. In a dark time in my life, I looked up and there
she was, my Shimmer, my Light of the Moon! Oh there have been many lights
in my life, most of which have  faded. Im sure there will be others, but
none will be more precious to me as She.To her I pledge my undying love and
affection for as long as she 
chooses to light my way!
